title: volume: Add support for overlay on named volumes
body:
Following PR allows containers to create and mount overlays on top of
named volumes instead of mounting actual volumes via already documented `:O`.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11640

yes @mheon PTAL corrected as per discussions yesterday no new volumes are created instead native named volume is mounted as overlay instead of `bind`. This persists states correctly in database.
